subject: A cracked-skin undead or supernatural figure in wide-brimmed hat and tattered frontier attire stands in a cave or tunnel, holding glowing red objects in both hands; a second shadowy figure stands behind
description: A lean humanoid figure occupies the center of an underground tunnel or cave setting. The figure wears a wide-brimmed hat, a tattered scarf or bandana at the neck, and ragged layered clothing in deep reds and blacks. The figure's skin appears cracked with glowing orange-red veins — suggesting undead, supernatural, or magically-corrupted nature. The figure holds a glowing object in each hand; both emit warm red-orange light. Behind and to the right, a second figure is visible only as a dark silhouette against the tunnel interior, also wearing a wide-brimmed hat. The overall palette is dark brown, black, and ember-red — fitting the underground setting of the Thunder Junction frontier underworld.
foreground: cracked-skin humanoid figure in wide-brimmed hat holding two glowing red objects
background: cave or tunnel interior, shadowy second figure in wide-brimmed hat
emotion: menace and self-assurance — arms slightly raised, glowing payload displayed
